PLAN_STATE: Start from the baseline assignment and focus on the 9 conflicting edges as the main bottleneck.
PLAN_STATE: Try to repair conflicts by recoloring the small set of high-degree nodes involved: N01, N04, N06, N12, N15, N19, N20, N25, N26, N27, N29, N30.
PLAN_STATE: Preserve as many nonconflicting adjacencies as possible; prefer local swaps over global recoloring.
PLAN_STATE: Because the graph is 4-colorable, aim first for a fully valid coloring; if that stalls, reduce conflicts below baseline by targeting the densest subgraph around N12/N19/N20/N29/N30.
PLAN_STATE: Use the baseline as a scaffold, but be willing to change colors of nodes with many conflicts even if they are currently stable elsewhere.
